greeting: ^Oh! Salutations, Barrington. Beautiful day for a climb, isn’t it! Feels more peaceful than usual.

^Speaking of climbs, I was just trying to figure out how to progress up this sheer incline here! I want to get a better look at those clouds – they look light and fluffy now, the sign of a sunny day! I want to go get some notes on the structure!
^I saw you knock over that container of bubbles into the pond below! If only we could find a way to move this platform… might be time to test one of my new levers!
